top_signals.title: Junk-Bond Sales Begin to Help Fund Castrol, Amex GBT Buyouts
top_signals.summary: A pair of junk-bond deals to help fund leveraged buyouts hit the market on Monday, after concurrent loan offerings were launched last week to partially finance those acquisitions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
